title: Apps vs. Websites
drDigitalIntro:
Apps and websites are different.
• A website opens in your browser when you type its address.
• An app is a program you install, with its own icon.
• Apps can work offline and send alerts; websites work anywhere. You'll use both!
drDigitalSuccess: Apps live on your device, websites live in your browser. Both are useful!
drDigitalHint: Just read along and click Continue.
